inputs: {"input": "Name one major function of the mitochondria in cells."}
reference_outputs: {"referenceOutput": "A major function of mitochondria is producing ATP (energy) through cellular respiration."}
outputs: {"answer": "The major function of the mitochondria is to carry out cellular respiration, which occurs primarily through oxidative phosphorylation. This process involves the transfer of electrons from oxygen and hydrogen ions into a molecule called ATP (adenosine triphosphate), producing energy that can be used for various metabolic processes within cells."}
